games.name: Charades
games.description: Act out a prompt, score points for your team, and race the clock!

games.name: Splurt Word Game
games.description: Flip a topic card and a letter card, then race to shout a word that fits! Track everyone's points on the built-in scoreboard.

games.name: Categories Party Game
games.description: Race through 12 numbered categories with a random letter and three-minute timer—all visible in fullscreen!
